prompt: Leadership wants a single platform to manage vendor onboarding, periodic reassessment, contract renewals, and offboarding under governance oversight. Which ServiceNow application delivers that end-to-end third-party risk program?
choices: Third-party Risk Management within the Governance, Risk, and Compliance suite
Hardware Asset Management for tracking laptop procurement and retirement events
Field Service Management for dispatching technicians to vendor facility sites
Employee Center for internal staff benefit requests and payroll case routing
explanation: TPRM centralizes onboarding, reassessment, renewal, monitoring, and offboarding workflows for third-party relationships within the GRC suite.

prompt: Which two fields on the Third-party Contact form are required to designate the main liaison and deliver automated portal credentials? (Choose two.)
choices: Primary contact checkbox flag identifying the main liaison for the third-party organization
Email address used to send portal login credentials and notification links to the external user
Department field listing the organizational unit name at the vendor company headquarters
Time Zone field defining the preferred regional offset for scheduled assessment reminders
explanation: Every third party must have a primary contact designated, and the email field triggers the automated notification containing portal login credentials.

prompt: Which TPRM program capabilities help teams manage vendor relationships across the full lifecycle beyond a single assessment event?
choices: Onboarding, offboarding, renewal, and additional due diligence workflows with continuous monitoring
Exclusive focus on annual password rotation for vendor technical contacts
Replacement of all procurement contracts with internal employee travel requests
Automatic conversion of every vendor record into a CMDB server configuration item
explanation: TPRM supports onboarding, offboarding, renewals, additional due diligence, assessment management, and continuous risk monitoring as core program capabilities.

prompt: An employee submits a due diligence request to prepare for an upcoming vendor contract renewal. Which request type should they select on the due diligence form?
choices: Reassess an existing engagement to prepare for a contract renewal
Offboard an engagement with no due diligence required
Open a standard change request for infrastructure deployment approval
Create a hardware asset record for end-user laptop procurement tracking
explanation: Due diligence requests support renewal reassessment so teams re-evaluate vendor risk before extending an existing engagement contract.

prompt: A new TPRM administrator must configure roles, permissions, and system settings to align the application with organizational policy. Which persona owns that responsibility?
choices: TPRM administrator who manages user roles, permissions, and application configuration
Third-party contact who responds to questionnaires exclusively through the external portal
Field service dispatcher who assigns mobile technicians to on-site hardware repairs
Catalog fulfiller who processes employee-facing service catalog item requests
explanation: TPRM administrators configure roles, permissions, and system settings so the application meets organizational risk management and compliance requirements.

prompt: Which two outcomes represent strategic benefits of consolidating third-party risk management in ServiceNow TPRM? (Choose two.)
choices: Reduced manual assessment burden through automated workflows and standardized questionnaires
Centralized portfolio visibility across third parties, engagements, scores, and remediation status
Elimination of all regulatory obligations for vendor relationships
Automatic removal of procurement teams from contract negotiation activities
explanation: TPRM automates assessment workflows and centralizes third-party portfolio data so teams gain consistent visibility and lower manual program costs.

prompt: Before sending full control questionnaires, a risk team runs an inherent risk evaluation to assign vendor tiers. Which assessment type supports that classification step?
choices: Tiering assessment that scores inherent risk indicators and assigns vendor risk tiers
Discovery assessment that scans vendor subnets and populates CMDB configuration items
Vulnerability assessment that imports CVE findings from external security scanner feeds
Employee satisfaction survey that collects internal staff feedback on workplace amenities
explanation: Tiering assessments evaluate inherent risk and assign tiers that determine assessment depth, cadence, and monitoring intensity for each vendor relationship.

prompt: Which table stores the primary third-party organization records managed in the TPRM data model?
choices: Company table (core_company) representing third-party organizations in the vendor portfolio
Incident table (incident) capturing IT service disruption tickets raised by internal employees
Change Request table (change_request) tracking infrastructure deployment approval workflows
Task table (task) storing generic work items unrelated to vendor risk assessment activities
explanation: Third-party organizations are stored on the Company table; engagements, contacts, assessments, and issues reference these organization records.

prompt: Which TPRM table represents a specific business relationship or scoped service between your organization and a third party?
choices: Third-party engagement (sn_vdr_risk_asmt_vendor_engagement) linking a vendor to a scoped business interaction
Hardware asset (alm_hardware) tracking physical device procurement and retirement lifecycle events
Problem record (problem) documenting root-cause analysis for recurring IT infrastructure failures
Knowledge article (kb_knowledge) storing internal employee self-service documentation content
explanation: Engagements represent scoped business relationships with third parties; assessments, tiering, and risk scores roll up at both the company and engagement levels.

prompt: An IRQ answer indicates the vendor handles regulated personal data. The team wants matching external questionnaires attached automatically. Which configuration approach implements that behavior?
choices: Configure internal questionnaire responses to auto-attach external questionnaires based on IRQ answers
Disable all external assessments until procurement manually emails questionnaire PDFs
Convert the vendor company record into a hardware asset with depreciation categories
Route the engagement through employee onboarding workflows for badge provisioning
explanation: TPRM can map IRQ responses to external questionnaire templates so the correct control domains are auto-attached when inherent risk answers meet configured conditions.

prompt: A TPRM team wants due diligence requests created automatically when new engagements meet portfolio criteria. Which configuration object should they define?
choices: Event-driven management rule (sn_tprm_dd_generation_rule) with conditions that trigger due diligence requests
Business rule on change_request that auto-closes infrastructure deployment tickets after CAB approval
Catalog client script (catalog_script_client) validating employee service catalog form inputs
UI policy on incident that hides the priority field from IT service desk agents
explanation: Event-driven management generation rules define conditions that automatically create due diligence requests when engagement or portfolio criteria are met.

prompt: Starting with TPRM 19.1.x, tiering questionnaire and external assessment reminder workflows migrate to which platform tool for customization?
choices: Workflow Studio for customizing tiering and assessment reminder automation flows
Discovery patterns for classifying unknown TCP ports on infrastructure servers
Performance Analytics breakdown sources for segmenting incident assignment groups
HR Journey Designer for employee lifecycle onboarding activity sequences
explanation: TPRM migrates tiering questionnaire and external assessment reminder workflows to Workflow Studio, replacing deprecated legacy workflow definitions.

prompt: An assessor wants deficient control responses on a Smart Assessment Engine template to spawn tracked remediation work. Which configuration should they enable?
choices: Issue-generation rule on the questionnaire template that creates issues or tasks when results meet conditions
UI action on the incident table that closes all related problem records without review
Scheduled report export that emails CSV files without creating platform records
Data policy that masks vendor names on unrelated company records in the CMDB
explanation: Issue-generation rules on SAE questionnaire templates can create issues or workflow tasks when assessment results meet defined deficiency conditions.

prompt: Which two records are core to storing an external third-party assessment and its answered questionnaire instance? (Choose two.)
choices: sn_vdr_risk_asmt_assessment external assessment header record
alm_hardware asset record used for warranty tracking on procured devices
sn_publications_publication catalog for knowledge article publishing workflows
asmt_assessment_instance questionnaire response instance linked to the assessment
explanation: External assessments live on sn_vdr_risk_asmt_assessment while asmt_assessment_instance stores the completed questionnaire responses.

prompt: A facilities vendor engagement requires collection of physical site and product element data before external due diligence. Which optional TPRM process should the TPR manager start?
choices: Third-party element collection process with questionnaires sent to the engagement contact
Discovery schedule that scans vendor subnets and creates CMDB server configuration items
Employee onboarding workflow that provisions badges and desk assignments for internal staff
Change advisory board review that approves infrastructure deployment requests
explanation: The optional third-party element collection process gathers structured element data through questionnaires before the due diligence assessment phase begins.

prompt: Before external questionnaires are sent, the TPR manager must validate auto-selected questionnaire sets for the third party and engagement contacts. Where does that review occur in the due diligence workflow?
choices: Vendor Management Workspace during the due diligence process before questionnaires are distributed
Third-party portal homepage where external contacts configure internal scoring rule criteria
Discovery workspace where operators classify unknown TCP ports on vendor infrastructure
Employee Center profile page where requesters update personal payroll direct deposit settings
explanation: During due diligence, the TPR manager reviews and approves auto-selected external questionnaire sets in Vendor Management Workspace before they are sent to vendor contacts.

prompt: After upgrading to Smart Assessment Engine questionnaires, where must assessors view smart assessments in the user interface?
choices: Vendor Management Workspace because smart assessments must be viewed in the GRC workspace
Classic Third-party Risk Management navigator lists exclusively without workspace access
Employee Center catalog portal used for internal HR benefit and payroll requests
Discovery workspace used for network scan status and CMDB classification review
explanation: Smart assessments must be viewed in the Vendor Management Workspace rather than legacy navigator views designed for classic assessments.

prompt: Which two actions can a third-party contact perform from the third-party portal? (Choose two.)
choices: Edit scoring rules on sn_vdr_risk_asmt_vendor_risk_scoring_rule configuration records
Respond to a Third-party Risk Assessment assigned to their organization
Manage Third-party Contacts for their company engagement
Approve internal due diligence requests as TPR manager
explanation: Portal contacts complete assigned assessments and maintain their contact roster; approval and scoring configuration remain internal functions.

prompt: A contract negotiator finishes executing a vendor agreement and must activate the engagement with contract dates recorded. Which action should they select on the due diligence request?
choices: Contract executed to attach the agreement and set contract start and expiration dates on the engagement
Skip contract to remove contract fields without entering a justification explanation
Draft assessment state that deletes all questionnaire responses from the vendor portal
Closed complete incident state on unrelated security tickets in the ITSM module
explanation: Selecting Contract executed attaches the signed agreement and sets contract start and expiration dates, moving the request to Engagement contract executed.

prompt: An engagement no longer requires a formal contract but still needs an active vendor relationship. How should the contract negotiator proceed in the contract risk process?
choices: Select Skip contract, provide required justification, and update engagement start and expiration dates
Delete the vendor from core_company and purge all historical assessment records
Convert the engagement into a hardware asset with an assigned depreciation schedule
Route the vendor through employee onboarding workflows for internal badge provisioning
explanation: Skip contract records justification, renames date fields to engagement start and expiration, and advances the request when no contract is required.

prompt: Procurement needs the contract negotiator to review all due diligence evidence before a renewal agreement is drafted. Where does the negotiator access pending contract risk work items?
choices: Vendor Management Workspace Task page under Due diligence requests for Negotiator
Employee Center catalog portal under internal hardware fulfillment requests
Discovery status dashboard listing subnet scan completion percentages
CMDB workspace dependency map showing unrelated infrastructure configuration items
explanation: Contract negotiators open the Vendor Management Workspace Task page and select Due diligence requests for Negotiator to review pending contract risk process work.

prompt: During offboarding, a contract negotiator confirms the vendor agreement is terminated. Which due diligence outcome records that termination?
choices: Contract terminated updates the termination date and moves the request to Contract terminated state
Contract executed reactivates the engagement with new start and expiration date values
Skip contract removes all justification requirements from the due diligence request
Ready for TPRM approval reopens questionnaire collection before negotiator review
explanation: Contract terminated updates the termination date with the current date and changes the due diligence request state to Contract terminated during offboarding.

prompt: A TPR manager wants ongoing visibility into whether vendors adhere to agreed service terms between assessment cycles. Which TPRM capability supports that operational review?
choices: Vendor Management Workspace monitoring to review third-party performance and adherence to agreed terms
Virtual Agent topics that reset employee passwords without vendor risk context
Performance Analytics widgets showing IT service desk mean handle time trends only
Project portfolio cost plans that forecast capital expenditure for internal initiatives
explanation: TPRM monitoring in Vendor Management Workspace helps teams regularly assess vendor performance and adherence to agreed-upon engagement terms.

prompt: Program leadership needs to track, prioritize, and manage due diligence responsibilities across the vendor portfolio. Which workspace feature provides that operational oversight?
choices: TPRM due diligence management reports accessible from Vendor Management Workspace
Incident matching rules that merge duplicate vendor tickets into a single problem record
Catalog fulfillment workflows that process employee-facing hardware request submissions
Discovery credential store for MID Server authentication secrets on target subnets
explanation: Due diligence management reports help TPRM users track, prioritize, and manage responsibilities across the third-party portfolio from the workspace.

prompt: Finance asks which TPRM activities consume managed-activity licenses when engagements are initiated. Which table records those usage events for verification?
choices: Usage analytics activities (sn_vdr_risk_asmt_ua_activity) logging each managed activity occurrence
Incident (incident) capturing IT service disruption tickets from internal employee submissions
Change Request (change_request) tracking infrastructure deployment approval workflow progress
OAuth entity registry (oauth_entity) storing REST API consumer credentials for integrations
explanation: The read-only Usage analytics activities table stores a record whenever a managed activity is initiated for license verification purposes.

prompt: A compliance manager wants vendor questionnaire responses to update control compliance status for mapped Policy and Compliance records. Which integration delivers that outcome?
choices: GRC Policy and Compliance Management integration that updates control status from third-party questionnaire responses
Discovery integration that classifies unknown TCP ports on vendor infrastructure servers
HR case management integration that routes employee payroll inquiries through Employee Center
Field service integration that dispatches technicians for on-site hardware repair visits
explanation: The Policy and Compliance integration updates control and control objective compliance status based on questionnaire responses from third parties and engagements.

prompt: After contract execution, legal must store the signed agreement so it appears in engagement document lists for audit. Which document management approach should the negotiator use?
choices: Add the contract through Document Management with New or Link Documents on the engagement Documents page
Email the contract to individual assessors and store copies only in personal inboxes
Attach the file exclusively to an unrelated incident record in the ITSM module
Export vendor data to a local spreadsheet without linking files to the engagement record
explanation: Contract negotiators attach executed agreements through Document Management so contracts appear in Documents related lists on the engagement record.

prompt: A renewal review concludes the vendor contract cannot be extended. Which contract risk process outcome rejects the engagement and notifies stakeholders?
choices: Contract not renewed captures justification and rejects the engagement after the owner closes the request
Contract executed sets new start and expiration dates and activates the engagement immediately
Skip contract deletes all vendor contacts and purges historical assessment evidence
Ready for TPRM approval sends questionnaires before negotiator review begins
explanation: Contract not renewed requires justification, updates the request state, and rejects the engagement with stakeholder notification when renewal is denied.

prompt: TPR managers need tailored KPI views of assessment volume, open issues, and program trends. Which workspace feature supports that performance tracking?
choices: TPRM personalized dashboards on the Vendor Management Workspace dashboard page
Discovery status records tracking subnet scan completion across infrastructure segments
Employee performance review cycles managed through the HR service delivery application
Catalog reporting widgets showing internal hardware request fulfillment turnaround times
explanation: TPRM personalized dashboards let TPR managers and assessors monitor assessment data and key program metrics from the workspace dashboard page.

prompt: An employee without TPRM workspace access needs to initiate vendor due diligence for a new engagement. Where should they submit the request?
choices: Employee Center due diligence request form specifying the third party and engagement details
Third-party portal /svdp path used by external vendor contacts for questionnaire completion
Discovery schedule configuration used by MID Servers for network infrastructure scanning
CMDB workspace used by configuration managers for dependency mapping and CI reconciliation
explanation: Employees initiate due diligence from Employee Center by submitting the due diligence request form with third-party and engagement information.

prompt: Procurement uses Source-to-Pay operations and wants supplier risk assessments coordinated with TPRM workflows. Which integration pattern aligns with ServiceNow guidance?
choices: Streamline supplier risk assessment workflows between Source-to-Pay and Third-party Risk Management
Replace all TPRM assessments with manual spreadsheet reviews stored on local file shares
Disable vendor portal access until procurement completes unrelated invoice approvals
Route supplier records exclusively through hardware asset depreciation schedule tables
explanation: ServiceNow documents Source-to-Pay integration patterns that streamline supplier risk assessment workflows with TPRM due diligence processes.

prompt: Sustainability leadership wants EcoVadis CSR ratings available during vendor due diligence. How does ServiceNow support that application relationship?
choices: EcoVadis integration that imports sustainability ratings to enrich third-party risk assessments
Discovery integration that maps vendor network topology into CMDB dependency records
HR integration that converts vendor contacts into internal employee user accounts
ITSM integration that routes all vendor findings to P1 incident records automatically
explanation: EcoVadis integration brings sustainability and CSR ratings into TPRM so teams can assess environmental and social vendor practices alongside risk data.
